penalties.description: No FLS Peg Transfer task performance is visible in the provided frames - only presentation slides about FES exam curriculum are shown.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified that the video contains only presentation slides about FES exam curriculum, not actual FLS Peg Transfer task performance. GPT-4o appears to have hallucinated task content that is not present in the video frames.

claude_value.description: No FLS Peg Transfer task performance is visible in the provided frames - only presentation slides about FES exam curriculum are shown.

gpt_value.description: Two rings left the field of view and were not retrievable.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that only presentation slides are visible is consistent with both models' frame_analyses being empty. GPT's detection of task phases and lost objects appears to be hallucinated content.
If no task performance is visible as Claude states, then completion time must be 0.0 seconds rather than 65.0 seconds.
No phases can be detected if no task performance is present in the video content.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric. GPT's positive scores are inconsistent with the absence of actual task performance.
